title: Civil Engineering Consortium (CEC)
content: Civil Engineering Consortium Civil Engineering Consortium (CEC) a technical student organization was established in 2008 under the Department of Civil Engineering, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat. The aim of CEC is to hone technical and professional skills of students by providing firsthand knowledge and on field experience. The students and faculty of Civil Engineering Department are its members. CEC is the platform for the organization of all activities: annual technical fest Sanrachna, workshops, seminars, technical events and student conferences in the field of Civil Engineering. The consortium has one world record in process on its name. GUEST LECTURE REPORT: 20 April, 2019 SEMINAR REPORT ON IMPORTANCE OF GATE: 20 March, 2019 Music, Entertainment Literature and Arts (MELA) Quiz: 09 Feb, 2019 PHYSICAL FITNESS CIRCUIT: 09 Feb, 2019 Auto CAD Software Workshop, 17th to 21st December, 2018 Symposium on RECENT TRENDS IN CIVIL ENGINEERING TOWARDS SUSTAINABLE ENVIRONMENT, on 16-17 October, 2018 CEC Orientation 2018: 12th October, 2018 CEC Industrial visit to NTPC KOLDAM on 22nd Sept. 2018 Autodesk Seminar Cum Workshop held on 10th Aug, 2018. Guest Lecture on Basic Surveying and Remote Sensing 07th May, 2018 REVIT Training – 16th-22nd April, 2018. Guest Lecture on entrepreneurship-23rd march 2018.
